title: astragalus pileh-khasehensis
intro: Astragalus pileh-khasehensis, also known as Khao Yai milkvetch or Astragalus, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It is commonly used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its potential health benefits. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a popular choice for treating various health conditions such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and immune system deficiencies. Astragalus pileh-khasehensis can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
